html:
Exclusive to:

For the boats seen in Shipwrecked and Hamlet, see Boats.

The Boat is a Floating Platform exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be created by launching a Boat Kit into the Ocean.

A Boat starts with 200 health, represented by the icon . When the reaches 0 the boat sinks. It leaves 3 Boards and half of the materials used to create all the structures on the boat. All Players drown and reappear on the nearest coast.

The Boat has one plank, which can be used to abandon ship at any time, suffering the same consequences as drowning.

Being made of wood, the boat itself is flammable and can catch fire (either from placing an open Campfire on it, or having the fire spread to other onboard flammable items), causing heavy damage to the boat depending on how many current segments are currently in flames (there are 5 segments total, the center, and 4 on each side). Contained fires, such as a Firepit or Scaled Furnace, can be safely placed and used on the boat.

In addition to sailing, a boat can be used to bridge together small gaps between land branches. This allows players to speed up their travel at little cost.

Repair

When damaged, the Boat can be repaired by the following materials. Tree Jam, Kelp Patch and Trusty Tape can only be used on Leaks.

Item Repair Value
Boat Patch 25 (repair leak)
Boards 50
Living Log 37.5
Twigs 13
Log, Driftwood Piece 12.5
Tree Jam 20 (repair leak)
Kelp Patch 0 (repair leak temporarily: small leak - 6 minutes, large leak - 4 minutes)
Trusty Tape 0 (repair leak)

Boat Kit

The Boat Kit is a craftable Item in the Seafaring Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Return of Them. It creates a Boat when placed on the Ocean.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Loyal Abandoned Ship skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 30, 2022 to July 14, 2022. As of August 5, 2022, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
  • The Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Boat skin is obtained by purchasing the Nendoroid Wilson Figure.
Woven - Elegant
Wagstaff Collection
Scrap Metal Boat
Why use wood when you can build a boat with sturdy, dependable metal?
Woven - Elegant
Swashbuckler Collection
Pirate Sloop
Terrorize the high seas with swashbuckling style.
Loyal
Nautical Collection
Abandoned Ship
No one knows how long this boat has been lost at sea, or what became of its crew.
Proof of Purchase
Arc Welded Boat
Make electromagnetic waves.

Trivia

  • The Boat Kit was introduced in the Turn of Tides update.

Assets

  • Pirate Sloop Kit Dropped
  • Pirate Sloop Planks
  • Pirate Sloop Planks 2
  • Pirate Sloop Build

Gallery

  • The boat in the Turn of Tides launch trailer.

–Wilson

–Willow

–Wolfgang

–Wickerbottom

–Wanda
The Boat Kit is a craftable Item in the Seafaring Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Return of Them. It creates a Boat when placed on the Ocean.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Loyal Abandoned Ship skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of Don't Starve Together on Twitch from June 30, 2022 to July 14, 2022. As of August 5, 2022, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points.
The Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Boat skin is obtained by purchasing the Nendoroid Wilson Figure.

Tóm tắt

Thuyền là một Nền Nổi độc quyền của Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tạo ra bằng cách phóng Bộ Thuyền xuống Biển.

Can hold structures. }} {{Exclusivity|Don't Starve Together}} {{For|the boats seen in [[Shipwrecked]] and [[Hamlet]]|Boats}} The '''Boat''' is a [[Floating Platform]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can be created by launching a Boat Kit into the [[Ocean]]. A Boat starts with 200 health, represented by the icon {{Hull}}. When the {{Hull}} reaches 0 the boat sinks. It leaves 3 [[Boards]] and half of the materials used to create all the structures on the boat. All Players [[Drowning|drown]] and reappear on the nearest coast. The Boat has one plank, which can be used to abandon ship at any time, suffering the same consequences as drowning. Being made of wood, the boat itself is flammable and can catch fire (either from placing an open [[campfire|Campfire]] on it, or having the fire spread to other onboard flammable items), causing heavy damage to the boat depending on how many current segments are currently in flames (there are 5 segments total, the center, and 4 on each side). Contained fires, such as a [[Firepit]] or [[Scaled Furnace]], can be safely placed and used on the boat. In addition to sailing, a boat can be used to bridge together small gaps between land branches. This allows players to speed up their travel at little cost. === Repair === When damaged, the Boat can be repaired by the following materials. [[Tree Jam]], [[Kelp Patch]] and [[Trusty Tape]] can only be used on [[Leak|Leaks]]. {|class="wikitable" ! style='text-align:center' | Item ! style='text-align:center' | Repair Value |- |{{pic32|Boat Patch}} [[Boat Patch]]|| 25 (repair leak) |- |{{pic32|Boards}} [[Boards]]|| 50 |- |{{pic32|Living Log}} [[Living Log]]|| 37.5 |- |{{pic32|Twigs}} [[Twigs]]|| 13 |- |{{pic32|Log}} [[Log]], {{pic32|Driftwood Piece}} [[Driftwood Piece]]|| 12.5 |- |{{pic32|Tree Jam}} [[Tree Jam]]|| 20 (repair leak) |- |{{pic32|Kelp Patch}} [[Kelp Patch]]|| 0 (repair leak temporarily: small leak - 6 minutes, large leak - 4 minutes) |- |{{pic32|Winona Portrait|Winona}}{{pic32|Trusty Tape}} [[Trusty Tape]]|| 0 (repair leak) |} ==Boat Kit== {{Object Infobox |name = Boat Kit |image = Boat Kit Dropped.png |icon = Boat Kit.png |burnTime = [[File:Light_Sources_Filter.png|32px|link=Fuel#Fire Fuel]] 3 min. |canBeBurned=1 |description = Let the seas be your domain. |ingredient1 = Boards |multiplier1 = 4 |filter = {{Pic32|Seafaring_Filter}} |perk = Create a boat when launched in the ocean. |tier = 20 |stack = Does not stack |spawnCode = "boat_item"}} {{Quotes |wilson = It would be nice to do some experiments on the water. |willow = That's the boat part of the boat. |wolfgang = Is for making very nice boat. |wendy = It's for making a boat. |wx78 = FOR BUILDING A HORRIBLE BOAT |wickerbottom = It will allow us to go on the water. |woodie = It contains the mast and the base of the boat. |maxwell = I've been reduced to a common shipyard laborer. |wigfrid = Ship building is in my bönes! |wanda = Ohhh I hate the ocean, the time stream gets so wobbly around it. |choose = willow}} The '''Boat Kit''' is a craftable [[Item]] in the [[Seafaring Filter]], exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It creates a Boat when placed on the [[Ocean]]. {{Clear}} == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Seafaring Skins|Belongings}} * The '''Loyal Abandoned Ship''' skin was awarded for watching 6 hours of ''Don't Starve Together'' on Twitch from June 30, 2022 to July 14, 2022. As of August 5, 2022, it is also available in the Klei Rewards shop for 1,200 Klei points. * The '''Proof of Purchase Arc Welded Boat''' skin is obtained by purchasing the [https://www.goodsmileus.com/products/dont-starve-nendoroid-wilson-figure Nendoroid Wilson Figure].
